basic_details.job_title: DCHS Kakinada Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 34 Civil Asst. Surgeon General and Specialists Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Coordinator of Hospital Services Kakinada (DCHS Kakinada)
basic_details.post_name: Civil Asst. Surgeon Specialists and Civil Asst. Surgeon General

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years. Age Relaxation: SC/ST/BC/EWS: 05 years Ex-service Men: 03 years Differently abled persons: 10 years Maximum with all relaxations: 52 years Age Reckoning Date: 01 June 2026

qualification.education_qualification: PG Degree / DNB / Diploma in the particular specialty or its equivalent qualification included in the schedule - I & II of the MCI Act, 1956 for Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialist. MBBS degree for CAS General Post. Must be registered in A.P. Medical Council.
qualification.details: Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialist: PG Degree / DNB / Diploma in the particular specialty or its equivalent qualification included in the schedule - I & II of the MCI Act, 1956. Must be registered in A.P. Medical Council. Civil Assistant Surgeon (General): MBBS degree. Must be registered in A.P. Medical Council.

salary_details.pay_scale: Civil Asst. Surgeon Specialists: Rs.1,10,000/-PM, Civil Asst. Surgeon General: Rs. 61,960/- PM
salary_details.details: Civil Asst. Surgeon Specialists: Rs.1,10,000/-PM Civil Asst. Surgeon General: Rs. 61,960/- PM

selection_process: Selection will be based on merit and rule of reservation. Merit list will be prepared for all the candidates who applied and fulfilled all the eligibility conditions. Selection lists will be prepared based on merit lists and Rule of Reservation issued in AP State and Subordinate Services.

all_official_links.label: Download DCHS Kakinada Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for DCHS Kakinada Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for DCHS Kakinada Recruitment 2026 will be conducted on 19th June 2026 and 20th June 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend within this period.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by DCHS Kakinada?
faq.answer: DCHS Kakinada has announced a total of 34 vacancies for the posts of Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialists and Civil Assistant Surgeon (General).

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: For Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialist, a PG Degree/DNB/Diploma in the respective specialty is required. For Civil Assistant Surgeon (General), an MBBS degree is the minimum qualification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 42 years, with relaxations applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialists?
faq.answer: Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialists will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 1,10,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for Civil Assistant Surgeon (General) posts?
faq.answer: The Civil Assistant Surgeon (General) posts offer a monthly salary of Rs. 61,960/-.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Vivekananda Hall, Collectorate, Kakinada.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original certificates and a set of self-attested photocopies of their educational qualifications, identity proof, and any other relevant documents.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a contract-based job?
faq.answer: Yes, the recruitment for these posts is on a contract basis.
